items.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The pause of Allbridge's cross-chain protocol highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, potentially impacting Solana's liquidity and user trust in cross-chain solutions.

items.title: Solana, Hyperliquid ETFs dominate altcoin fund flows despite flying under the radar
items.whyYouShouldCare: The influx of funds into Solana and Hyperliquid ETFs indicates growing institutional interest, which could enhance liquidity and ecosystem development for SOL.

items.title: Balance Coin’s 99.75% crash – Exploit, rug pull or something else?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The dramatic crash of Balance Coin raises concerns about security in the ecosystem, which could affect investor confidence and overall market stability for Solana.
